info.description: Production-grade taxi backend API for small cities and rural areas.
info.title: Taxi Platform API

get.summary: Get admin taxi park finance overview
Get admin taxi park platform fee debt

get.description: Exports only platform-owned trusted local_geo_points; temporary external geocoder cache is never exported.
get.summary: Export trusted local points as Pelias CSV

get.description: Lists immutable legal document versions filtered by type and language.

post.description: Creates a new legal document row. When activate=true, older versions of the same type and language become inactive.
post.summary: Create new immutable legal document version

post.description: Activates the selected legal document version and deactivates other versions of the same type and language.
Deactivates the selected legal document version.
Confirms the SMS code sent during registration.
Sends a verification code for the notification email attached to an existing account.
Confirms the notification email and returns a fresh access/refresh token pair.
Authenticates by phone number and password. SMS codes are used only for registration phone confirmation.
Revokes the provided refresh token.
Returns new access and refresh tokens. Old refresh token must be invalidated by service layer.
Registers passenger, driver, or taxi park owner. Personal data consent and terms acceptance are mandatory.
Verifies email confirmation code and returns access/refresh tokens. SMS code verification is used only by /auth/confirm-phone after registration.

get.summary: List cars attached to current driver

post.description: Driver mobile clients must send no more than one update per two seconds unless using batch endpoint.

get.description: Mobile reconnect sync endpoint. Response includes allowed_actions for driver UI.
Fallback sync endpoint for reconnect or weak internet. Returns Redis-backed active offers still available for accept/reject.
get.summary: List active order offers for current driver

get.description: Returns full trip card for current or historical order owned by authenticated driver.

post.summary: Mark driver is going to pickup point

post.description: Driver can cancel before trip starts, for example after waiting too long.

get.description: Route points are recorded from trip start until completion while driver location updates are received.
get.summary: Get recorded route points for driver order

post.description: Accepts offline-buffered historical route points for a concrete driver order. Duplicate points are ignored by `(order_id, recorded_at, latitude, longitude)`.
post.summary: Upload buffered route points for driver order

post.description: Attaches driver avatar/photo. The file must be jpeg, png, or webp and no larger than 5 MB.
Persists a user, driver, or dispatcher confirmed point as platform-owned local data.

get.description: Searches trusted local points first, then local Pelias, then temporary DaData fallback, then Yandex fallback.
Returns public API health status.
Returns process liveness status for orchestrators.
Returns readiness status for traffic routing.
Returns current active trip state for reconnect recovery.
Searches address suggestions for passenger mobile order form.
Mobile reconnect sync endpoint. Response includes allowed_actions for passenger UI.

post.description: Returns estimated distance, duration and tariff price for mobile order form.
Attaches passenger avatar/photo. The file must be jpeg, png, or webp and no larger than 5 MB.

get.description: Returns the currently active immutable personal data consent version from legal_documents.
Returns the active immutable legal document version for the requested document type.
get.summary: Get active legal document by type

get.description: Returns the currently active immutable privacy policy version from legal_documents.
Returns the currently active immutable terms of service version from legal_documents.

post.description: Creates a driver account under the current taxi park by phone number. If password is omitted, backend generates a temporary password and returns it once.

get.description: Returns current driver coordinates, stale flag, status, verification status, and assigned car summary for taxi park dashboard maps.
get.summary: List taxi park driver locations for dashboard map

parameters.description: Location max age before stale=true, default 30
parameters.name: max_age_seconds

get.summary: List cars attached to taxi park driver

post.summary: Attach taxi park car to driver

delete.summary: Detach taxi park car from driver

post.description: Sets the car primary driver to the selected driver and keeps the driver-car assignment link. This endpoint can reassign a car that already has another primary driver.
post.summary: Assign taxi park car as primary driver car
Mark taxi park driver payout paid

get.summary: Get taxi park platform fee accruals
Get taxi park platform fee debt

post.description: Creates an order from taxi park or dispatcher workspace. If passenger_phone is omitted, the order is linked to the taxi park owner account as a fallback.

post.summary: Assign driver to taxi park scheduled order

get.description: Returns order state for taxi park owner or active dispatcher dashboard.

patch.description: Dispatchers can change destination while the order is not terminal. All changes are persisted and published over WebSocket as order.updated.
patch.summary: Update taxi park order addresses or payment/comment

post.description: Stops dispatch if the order is still searching and publishes order.cancelled to dashboards, passenger, and driver.
Completes an in-progress order from dispatcher dashboard, stores final price, settles finance, and publishes order.completed.

patch.summary: Update taxi park settings and branding

get.description: Mobile realtime endpoint. JWT can be passed in Authorization header or token query parameter. After reconnect the server emits sync.required and the client must call the current order REST endpoint.

parameters.description: JWT token fallback for mobile clients
parameters.name: token

period_from.description: PeriodFrom is the inclusive start of the platform fee billing period.

period_to.description: PeriodTo is the exclusive end of the platform fee billing period.

payload.description: Payload contains the generated JSON finance document body until PDF rendering is implemented.

platform_fee_amount.description: PlatformFeeAmount is recorded as a separate service fee accrual and is not deducted from taxi park order income.

taxi_park_income_amount.description: TaxiParkIncomeAmount equals the full taxi park commission amount for the order; for example 200 RUB, not 198 RUB.

amount.description: Amount is the separate accumulated taxi park debt to the platform and must not be mixed with taxi park order income.
Amount is the billed platform service fee amount derived from separate accruals for the selected period.

platform_debt_amount.description: PlatformDebtAmount is a separate taxi park obligation to the platform; example: 1000 RUB order -> 200 RUB taxi park income and 2 RUB platform debt.

platform_service_fee_amount.description: PlatformServiceFeeAmount is accrued separately and must not reduce taxi_park_income_amount inside order settlement.

taxi_park_income_amount.description: TaxiParkIncomeAmount is the full taxi park income from the order commission before any platform fee settlement.

BearerAuth.description: Enter the token with the `Bearer ` prefix, for example: Bearer eyJhbGciOi...
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
